description: Add a new movable diagnostics panel to the ASE workspace in react/my-app and keep the root flexlayout shell consistent.
acceptance_criteria: The panel is a real flexlayout-react tab or border tab.
The panel can be moved between flexlayout areas.
The app still builds with npm run build.

constraints.value: Edit only files inside react/my-app unless the task explicitly requires more.
Do not introduce a second workspace system outside flexlayout-react.

suggested_edits.description: Register the new diagnostics panel in the ASE flexlayout model.
